name: Productivity Clock
description: Track your work & focus sessions. Pomodoro timer, daily goals, monthly reports — all in one clean interface.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self';
